ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "instnm" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "campus_size" REAL /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Trend in enrollment over the past few years */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Status of the institution's accreditation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for general inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for general inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "grad_debt_mdn" REAL /* Median graduate debt of students */,
  "mn_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Mean earnings of graduates ten years post-enrollment */,
  "md_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Median earnings of graduates ten years post-enrollment */,
  "pct10_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Percentage of graduates earning at or below the 10th percentile ten years post-enrollment */,
  "pct25_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Percentage of graduates earning at or below the 25th percentile ten years post-enrollment */,
  "pct75_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Percentage of graduates earning at or below the 75th percentile ten years post-enrollment */,
  "pct90_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Percentage of graduates earning at or below the 90th percentile ten years post-enrollment */,
  "sd_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Standard deviation of earnings ten years post-enrollment */,
  "grad_debt_p25" REAL /* 25th percentile of graduate debt */,
  "grad_debt_p75" REAL /* 75th percentile of graduate debt */,
  "grad_debt_p90" REAL /* 90th percentile of graduate debt */,
  "debt_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of graduate debt to median earnings */,
  "financial_aid_availability" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving financial aid */,
  "financial_aid_average" REAL /* Average amount of financial aid received per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_outcomes" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of graduates within a certain period post-graduation */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* Job placement rate of graduates within their field of study */,
  "employment_rate_6mo" REAL /* Employment rate of graduates within 6 months post-graduation */,
  "employment_rate_12mo" REAL /* Employment rate of graduates within 12 months post-graduation */,
  "job_placement_rate_6mo" REAL /* Job placement rate within 6 months post-graduation */,
  "job_placement_rate_12mo" REAL /* Job placement rate within 12 months post-graduation */,
  "average_job_search_duration" REAL /* Average duration of job search for graduates */,
  "average_salary_increase" REAL /* Average salary increase from pre-graduation to post-graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment number at the institution */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown of students by race/ethnicity */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution among students */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group distribution of students */,
  "international_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "veterans" REAL /* Percentage of students who are veterans */,
  "first_generation_students" REAL /* Percentage of students who are first-generation college students */,
  "underrepresented_minorities" REAL /* Percentage of students from underrepresented minority groups */,
  "student_to_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty members */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "tuition_in_state" REAL /* Tuition fees for in-state students */,
  "tuition_out_of_state" REAL /* Tuition fees for out-of-state students */,
  "fees" REAL /* Additional fees charged by the institution */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other estimated expenses */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total estimated cost of attendance */,
  "tuition_fees_trend" TEXT /* Trend in tuition and fees over the past few years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of degree awarded (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major associated with the academic program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the program */,
  "program_completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate of the program */,
  "average_time_to_completion" REAL /* Average time to complete the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the program was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid", "program_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution (foreign key reference to institutions) */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Monetary amount awarded through the scholarship */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria required to apply for the scholarship */,
  "number_of_awards" INTEGER /* Number of scholarships awarded */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying for the scholarship */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Whether the scholarship is renewable */,
  "scholarship_type" TEXT /* Type of scholarship (e.g., merit-based, need-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid", "scholarship_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial analysis, employment outcomes) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)
